modules.name: Trigonomicon
modules.description: Generative drum trigger pattern generator with IDM, breakcore, amen, and drill-inspired patterns

modules.name: SlideWyrm
modules.description: TB-303 style acid pattern generator with slide and accent

modules.name: Septagon
modules.description: Generative polyrhythmic drum patterns in 7/4 with phase-space warping

modules.name: Minimalith
modules.description: Minimal PreenFM2 FM synth engine - load banks, play patches, CV modulation

modules.name: Amenolith
modules.description: 5-instrument multisample drum kit player with kits, velocity layers, roll, tune, length trim, and individual outs

modules.name: Phaseon1
modules.description: Performance-first Phaseon variant: 4-op PM synth with user-loaded wavetable and formant shaper

modules.name: Xenostasis
modules.description: Autonomous hybrid synthesis organism — self-regulating spectral drone with wavetable + organic bytebeat cross-modulation and internal metabolism

modules.name: FERROKLAST
modules.description: Six-lane FM percussion synth with kick, snares, metallic hats, and chaotic IDM percussion voices

modules.name: FERROKLAST MM
modules.description: MetaModule-focused Ferroklast variant with reduced voice set and embedded feature cuts
